ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the node (e.g., data center, region) */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of node (e.g., compute, storage) */,
  "node_status" TEXT /* Status of the node (e.g., online, offline) */,
  "node_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the node */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the node was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the node was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process */,
  "process_name" TEXT /* Name of the process */,
  "process_type" TEXT /* Type of process (e.g., application, system) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the process */,
  "process_status" TEXT /* Status of the process (e.g., running, stopped) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the process was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the process was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_processes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node running the process */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time the process started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time the process ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the process on the node (e.g., running, stopped) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the node-process relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the node-process relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id", "process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_failures" (
  "failure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each failure */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process that failed */,
  "failure_time" TEXT /* Time the process failed */,
  "failure_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the failure */,
  "failure_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the failure */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the failure was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the failure was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("failure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_failures_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., CPU usage, memory usage) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Time the metric was recorded */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., %, MB) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_metrics_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., response time, throughput) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Time the metric was recorded */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., ms, req/s) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_metrics_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node being accessed */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node that triggered the alert */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the alert */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node the rule applies to */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process the rule applies to */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the rule */,
  "rule_condition" TEXT /* Condition for the rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the rule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_rules_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_rules_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that triggered the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message included in the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node the report applies to */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process the report applies to */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Time the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., system metrics, process metrics) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "template_data" TEXT /* Data included in the template */,
  "template_type" TEXT /* Type of template (e.g., system metrics, process metrics) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the template was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the template was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_group_membership" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the node joined the group */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the node's membership was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id", "group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_group_membership" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the process joined the group */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the process's membership was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id", "group_id")
)
